title: Charlottesville, VA — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Charlottesville, VA: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Charlottesville is a city in VA with a population of 48,000. Home of the University of Virginia and Thomas Jefferson’s Monticello with a vibrant downtown.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
